# Cronozen Platform

> Cronozen is a multi-tenant SaaS platform for rehabilitation, welfare, education, pharmacy, commerce, mentoring, and interior verticals. It provides a unified operating system for center management with AI-powered automation.

## Platform Architecture

Cronozen operates as a hub-and-spoke ecosystem:

- **OPS (cronozen.com)**: Hub — SSO, payments, tenant master, DPU, 7 verticals
- **LMS (learn.cronozen.com)**: Spoke — learning engine, compliance, EMON
- **CMS (blog.cronozen.com)**: Spoke — blog, manuals, content
- **ERP (erp.cronozen.com)**: Spoke — business management (Odoo)

## Core Capabilities

- Multi-tenant SaaS with center/workspace isolation
- Actor-based authentication (ADMIN, INSTRUCTOR, PARENT, CHILD)
- DPU (Decision Proof Unit): SHA-256 hash chain for audit-ready decision tracking
- 5-level governance: policy existence → evidence level → human review → risk threshold → dual approval
- 200+ database tables, 134+ APIs, 7 verticals
- White-label support for partner organizations

## Authentication

- JWT-based with multi-tenant context
- SSO via auth.cronozen.com
- Actor family: related actors linked by email/phone
- Membership lifecycle: INVITED → PENDING → ACTIVE → SUSPENDED → REJECTED → ENDED
- Tenant types: CENTER, WORKSPACE, PROGRAM, WHITE_LABEL

## Key APIs

- `/api/auth/*` — Authentication and session management
- `/api/centers/*` — Center (tenant) management
- `/api/workspace/*` — Personal workspace operations
- `/api/partner/*` — Partner platform APIs
- `/api/schedules/*` — Unified scheduling
- `/api/workflows/*` — AI automation workflows

## Data Architecture

- PostgreSQL with pgvector for AI embeddings
- Redis for caching and session
- Prisma ORM with scoped models for tenant isolation
- Append-only audit log with 12 event types

## AI & Automation

- DPU hash chain for decision provenance
- JSON-LD v2 export (schema.cronozen.com/decision-proof/v2)
- Evidence levels: DRAFT(0) → DOCUMENTED(1) → AUDIT_READY(2)
- Workflow automation engine

## Documentation

- Developer docs: docs.cronozen.com
- Blog & strategy: blog.cronozen.com
- Operations manuals: blog.cronozen.com/manuals
- API reference: docs.cronozen.com/api-reference
